arts.ttl: Brentford XI vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Brentford head to struggling Leicester tonight looking to continue their impressive away form. Thomas Frank’s team have won each of their last three Premier League games on the road. After a poor start to the season in fixtures away from the Gtech, Brentford are unbeaten in four on their travels and have reeled off successive […] The post Brentford XI vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Leicester can climb out of the Premier League’s bottom three with a win against Brentford on Friday night. The Foxes kick off the top-flight weekend when hosting the Bees at the King Power Stadium this evening. It’s been a torrid run for head coach Ruud van Nistelrooy, whose side have lost nine of their last […] The post Leicester vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: West Ham and Leicester City want to sign same player – Have made ‘unofficial offers’
arts.sum: West Ham United and Leicester City are in the picture to sign Club Brugge’s Chemsdine Talbi in the summer window. That’s at least what Africa Foot are reporting, and they cover the latest on West Ham and Leicester’s efforts to try and sign the 19-year-old. arts.sum: Leicester and Brentford kick off the weekend’s Premier League action as the pair face off at the King Power Stadium tonight. Ahead of the game, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provi...

arts.ttl: Leicester City must address record-breaking problem for Brentford with Nigel Pearson approach - Josh Holland - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Should van Nistelrooy's men fail to score and lose again on Friday, they will become the first team in top-flight history to go six in a row in the same season. Leicester City kick off a crucial period in their fight to stay in the Premier League this evening when they have the advantage of playing before their rivals kick a ball.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy knows what Wolves and Ipswich have amid Odsonne Edouard and Jamie Vardy woes
arts.sum: But despite a lack of goals – City scoring just four times in their last 10 Premier League fixtures – van Nistelrooy will not include two strikers among his substitutes. He’s now scored in just one of his last nine Premier League games and while his shot count initially soared under van Nistelrooy, he failed to have a single effort at goal against both Everton and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Brentford loanee Mads Roerslev in contention for first Bundesliga start
arts.sum: Brentford loanee Mads Roerslev might be in line for his Bundesliga starting XI debut this coming Saturday. The Dane’s current German outfit, Wolfsburg, are without Kilian Fischer, who is suspended.…
